visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark hair, wearing a dark suit jacket over a light-colored collared shirt. He has a serious and concerned expression as he looks slightly off-camera. In the blurred background, other figures in dark suits are visible, suggesting a crowded or busy environment. The lighting is dim and cool-toned. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera is shaky, creating a sense of urgency or movement. The audio opens with a low, tense, and suspenseful musical score that immediately establishes a feeling of high stakes and seriousness. The camera pans quickly across a blurry, black-and-white image, possibly a poster or a photograph. The image is indistinct, but the white Chinese characters "风行网" remain visible in the top left corner. The rapid movement and lack of focus create a disorienting and fast-paced visual.
